name: method_grounding
input_text:
1 Introduction
PaperAgent studies grounded paper reading for reliable evidence checks.

2 Method
The method builds a reader agent, extractor agent, and verifier agent. The verifier checks each core claim against evidence ids.

3 Experiments
Experiments evaluate the harness on synthetic document understanding cases.
expected_claims: The method builds a reader agent, extractor agent, and verifier agent.
The verifier checks each core claim against evidence ids.
forbidden_claims: The paper introduces a new large-scale benchmark dataset.
